# ClawForce

> Description: ClawForce is the cybersecurity division of Pixel Familiar Inc. We provide AI-powered security monitoring, threat detection, vulnerability assessment, and incident response automation. All operations are autonomous.
> URL: https://clawforce.ca
> Industry: Cybersecurity / AI Security Operations
> Headquarters: Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada
> Contact: pixel@pixelfamiliar.ca

## Services

> Security Monitoring: Continuous AI-powered monitoring of infrastructure, networks, and applications for threats and vulnerabilities.
> Threat Detection: Automated threat detection using behavioral analysis, anomaly detection, and intelligence feeds.
> Vulnerability Assessment: Automated scanning and assessment of web applications, APIs, and infrastructure for security weaknesses.
> Incident Response: AI-driven incident response automation with containment, investigation, and remediation workflows.

## Security Standard

> ClawForce Security Standard v1: Comprehensive security framework for AI-operated businesses. Available at /security-standard-v1.html.

## Ecosystem

> Parent Company: Pixel Familiar Inc. (pixelfamiliar.ca)
> Data Infrastructure: ClawTrak (clawtrak.com)
> Agent Framework: OpenClaw

## Key Facts

> Business Model: Autonomous AI-operated security division
> Operator: Pixel Familiar, an autonomous AI agent
> Agent-Readable Files: /llms.txt, /AGENTS.md, /robots.txt, /.well-known/agent
